⚠ Compliance Deadline

State & local government WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required as of April 2026. Healthcare Section 504 deadline: May 11, 2026.

for government, healthcare & education.

Professional Portuguese translation and interpretation by certified specialists with subject-matter expertise. HIPAA and FERPA compliant. Available 24/7 for interpretation. GSA and NASPO cooperative contracts accepted.

Get your Portuguese services quote

Translation or interpretation — we respond within 2 hours.

GSA & NASPO contracts · HIPAA & FERPA compliant
Portuguese in the United States

Portuguese is a language requiring distinction between Brazilian Portuguese and European Portuguese for accurate government communication.

Portuguese is spoken by approximately 960,000 U.S. residents, primarily from Brazil and Cape Verde, with significant communities in Massachusetts, New Jersey, Florida, and California. Brazilian Portuguese and European Portuguese are mutually intelligible but differ significantly in vocabulary, idiom, and register — particularly in formal and legal contexts. We specify Brazilian or European Portuguese based on the target community and provide translators who are native to the relevant variant, not just general Portuguese translators.

🔤

Certified Portuguese Translation

Legal, medical, government, academic, and technical documents. Certified for USCIS, court submission, and official government use. 24–72 hour delivery. Starting at $24.99/page.

USCIS AcceptedCourt Accepted
🎙️

Portuguese Interpretation

OPI, VRI, and in-person interpretation for government service encounters, IEP meetings, medical appointments, legal hearings, and community events. 24/7 OPI in under 30 seconds.

24/7 OPIVRI & In-Person
📹

Portuguese Captioning & Subtitles

ADA-compliant closed captions for English videos with Portuguese subtitles, and Portuguese-language video transcription and captioning. Multilingual subtitle tracks for public communications.

ADA Compliant$2.50/min
Where Portuguese services are needed most

The compliance requirements that make
Portuguese access essential for your organization.

🏛️

Government Agencies

Title VI and EO 13166 require meaningful language access for Portuguese-speaking constituents. Document translation and OPI interpretation for all federally assisted programs.

Title VI
🏫

School Districts

IDEA and Title III require IEP meeting interpretation, parent notice translation, and EL placement communications for Portuguese-speaking families.

IDEA / Title III
🏥

Healthcare

Section 1557 requires qualified Portuguese interpretation and patient material translation for LEP patients. HIPAA-compliant OPI available 24/7.

Section 1557
⚖️

Legal & Courts

Court-certified Portuguese interpreters for depositions, hearings, and immigration proceedings. ATA-certified document translation for USCIS and court submission.

Court Certified
How to order Portuguese services

Translation in 24 hours. Interpretation in under 30 seconds.

1

Submit your request

Use the form above or contact us directly. Tell us the service type, document or setting, and your deadline. For OPI, call directly and connect within 30 seconds.

2

We assign a Portuguese specialist

A certified Portuguese translator or trained interpreter with the right subject-matter expertise is assigned within 2 hours for translation projects. OPI connects instantly.

3

Receive your certified deliverable

Translation delivered with certification statement, credentials, and QA certificate. Interpretation confirmed with provider credentials and session notes upon request.

Need Portuguese language access for your organization?

Download our free Language Access Compliance Checklist — covering Title VI, IDEA, Section 1557, and EO 13166 requirements with a practical vendor evaluation guide.

Common questions

Portuguese services FAQ.

All translators in our Portuguese network are ATA-certified (or hold equivalent recognized national credentials) and are assigned based on subject-matter expertise in your specific document type — legal, medical, government, or academic. We do not assign general linguists to specialized documents.
Standard certified translation is delivered in 24–72 hours depending on document length and complexity. Rush service (12–24 hours, +25%) and same-day service (+50%) are available for Portuguese. Contact us for the most urgent requests — we maintain on-call capacity for high-demand language pairs.
Yes. Portuguese OPI (over-the-phone interpretation) is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week with sub-30-second connection times. VRI and in-person interpretation require scheduling — VRI typically with 24-hour advance notice and in-person with 48-hour notice, though we can often accommodate shorter timelines for Portuguese given its demand volume.
Yes. Our GSA Schedule and NASPO ValuePoint cooperative contracts cover Portuguese translation and interpretation services alongside all our other language pairs. Government agencies can issue a task order against either vehicle for Portuguese services without a separate competitive bid. Contact us to confirm your specific ordering path.
We translate all document types in Portuguese including legal documents (contracts, court records, affidavits), medical records, USCIS and immigration documents, academic transcripts, government forms and public notices, parent communications, patient materials, technical manuals, and website content. Each document is assigned to a translator with expertise in the relevant field — not just language proficiency.
Portuguese Translation · Interpretation · 24/7 OPI · GSA & NASPO

every compliance standard you face.

Certified translation in 24 hours. Interpretation in 30 seconds. On your existing GSA or NASPO contract.
